title: Smart City Traffic Forecast
summary: Forecast congestion and package decisions for city ops, routing, and planning teams.
knowledge_base: Smart City Traffic Forecast is positioned as a Urban Data starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Forecast congestion and package decisions for city ops, routing, and planning teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on traffic, forecast, cities.

app_modules.label: Scenario 01
app_modules.title: Forecast Input Studio
app_modules.description: Model a planning scenario from the primary business and operational levers.
app_modules.hint: Forecast confidence and planning band will appear here.

app_modules.label: Scenario 02
app_modules.title: Variance Explorer
app_modules.description: Explain how actual metrics differ from the expected planning baseline.
app_modules.hint: Variance summary and largest movement will appear here.

app_modules.label: Scenario 03
app_modules.title: Planning Memo
app_modules.description: Turn raw scenario inputs into a concise operational recommendation.
app_modules.hint: Decision memo and next steps will appear here.
